title: Plan a Product Launch
description: Sequence the work to ship and land a launch.
content:
Help me plan the launch of: {{feature}}

Work backward from the goal. Define what success looks like and how it is measured. Sequence the work: readiness (the thing actually works and is supportable), the rollout (flag, gradual, or big bang) matched to the risk, and the announcement and enablement. Identify the riskiest assumption to de-risk before launch. List what could go wrong on launch day and the plan for each. Keep it honest about what is must-have versus nice-to-have.
